boundary.source: local raw/genepert_bench h5ad obs metadata candidate table

artifacts.description: Condition-level coverage/QC proxy derived from local raw genepert h5ad obs columns n_genes, n_genes_by_counts, and total_counts. This tests whether locally available obs metadata can reopen a reliability-weighted or filtered training route.
artifacts.promotion_note: If this passes CPU preflight, require shuffle/source/count/tail controls and external audit before any clipped weighting or robust-loss GPU smoke.
